channel.title: Microsoft Learn - in Intune
channel.description: The latest updates from Microsoft Learn in Intune

item.title: Configure the Microsoft Managed Home Screen App - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to configure the Microsoft Managed Home Screen app.

item.title: Enable MDM automatic enrollment for Windows - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Enable Intune automatic enrollment for Windows devices joining or registering with your Microsoft Entra ID.

item.title: App Protection Policies Overview - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how Microsoft Intune app protection policies help protect your company data and prevent data loss.

item.title: Use Intune Suite add-on capabilities - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Microsoft Intune Suite unifies a series of mission-critical advanced endpoint management and security capabilities. The capabilities of the suite are integrated with Microsoft 365 and Microsoft Security across endpoint platforms for both cloud and on-premises co-managed devices.

item.title: Set up automated device enrollment (ADE) for iOS/iPadOS - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to enroll corporate-owned iOS/iPadOS devices into Microsoft Intune with Apple Automated Device Enrollment (ADE).

item.title: Manage Apple Volume-Purchased Apps - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to sync apps you bought in volume through Apple Business Manager with Microsoft Intune. Then manage and track these apps on iOS/iPadOS and macOS devices.

item.title: In development - Microsoft Intune
item.description: This article describes Microsoft Intune features that are in development.

item.title: Set the mobile device management authority - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn about how to set the mobile device management authority in Microsoft Intune and some key considerations.

item.title: Connect Intune account to managed Google Play account - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to connect your Intune account to your Managed Google Play account.

item.title: Manage Windows Update Ring Policies - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn about Windows Update ring policies for Windows devices, how to create and manage them, and improve update deployment.

item.title: Planning guide to move to Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Plan, design, implement, adopt, and move to Microsoft Intune. Get guidance and advice to determine goals, use-case scenarios and requirements, and create rollout and communication plans, support, testing, and validation plans.

item.title: Plan for Remote Help with Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn about the requirements and capabilities of Remote Help with Microsoft Intune on Windows, macOS, and Android Enterprise.

item.title: Set up Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Step 1 for deploying or setting up Intune. The starting point is to review supported configurations, sign up for the trial, configure the custom domain name, add users and groups to Intune, assign licenses to users, manage roles, grant admin permissions, and set the MDM authority.

item.title: Using Azure Virtual Desktop multi-session with Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Guidelines for using Azure Virtual Desktop multi-session with Microsoft Intune

item.title: Sign Up for Microsoft Intune Free Trial Setup Guide - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Sign up for a Microsoft Intune free trial and configure your tenant. Learn the setup process, prerequisites, and how to configure domain names. Start evaluating Intune today.

item.title: Assign Apps to Groups in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to assign an Intune app to groups of users or devices using Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Questions with policies and profiles in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Common questions, answers, and scenarios with device policies and profiles in Microsoft Intune. Learn more about profile changes not applying to users or devices, how long it takes for new policies to deploy, which settings apply when there are conflicts, what happens when you delete or remove a profile, and more.

item.title: Tutorial - Walkthrough the Microsoft Intune Admin Center - Microsoft Intune
item.description: In this tutorial, you will tour Microsoft Intune in the Microsoft Intune admin center to better understand how to accomplish tasks.

item.title: Configure Universal Print policy using settings catalog in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Use the settings catalog in Microsoft Intune to create a Universal Print policy for Windows 10/11 client devices. The policy automatically installs printers on your managed devices.

item.title: Update Microsoft 365 apps with the settings catalog in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Use settings catalog in Microsoft Intune to update Microsoft 365 apps to the latest version, and choose how frequently Office checks for updates. See the device registry keys that are updated when an Intune policy to Office update is applied.

item.title: Get started with Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: See an overview of the steps to start using Intune. Plan your move and deployment of Intune, determine your licensing needs and any platform requirements, use compliance and Conditional Access, deploy apps, create device configuration profiles, and enroll your devices to be managed. Get more information on mobile application management for BYOD or personal devices.

item.title: Deployment guide to manage macOS devices in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn the recommended processes to manage macOS devices in Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Endpoint analytics overview - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Discover how Microsoft Intune endpoint analytics provides actionable insights to optimize device performance, improve user experience, and enable proactive IT troubleshooting.

item.title: Integrate Microsoft Defender for Endpoint with Intune for Device Compliance - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Integrate Microsoft Defender for Endpoint with Microsoft Intune as a Mobile Threat Defense (MTD) solution to enforce device compliance and prevent security breaches.

item.title: Deployment guide to manage iOS/iPadOS devices in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: A guide to managing iOS/iPadOS devices in Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Add groups to organize users and devices for Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Create Microsoft Entra groups to organize users and devices for use with Microsoft Intune.

item.title: ServiceNow integration with Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: ServiceNow integration enables help desk staff, who are licensed to use Remote Help, to use ServiceNow to view incidents and details of the tech issue that an employee is facing from the Troubleshooting pane. This article also describes how to configure ServiceNow integration with Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Enroll personal devices in Intune with Android Enterprise work profile management - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Set up Intune for personal devices and bring-your-own-device scenarios using Android Enterprise work profile management.

item.title: Deployment guide to manage Android devices in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn the recommended processes to manage Android devices in Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Audit changes and events in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to review audit logs that record Microsoft Intune activities.

item.title: Jamf Managed Device Compliance with Microsoft Entra ID - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Integrate Jamf Pro with Microsoft Intune to report device compliance to Microsoft Entra ID.

item.title: Using Azure Virtual Desktop single-session with Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Guidelines for using Azure Virtual Desktop single-session with Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Manually configure Jamf Pro integration with Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Manually configure Jamf Pro integration with Intune when you can't use the Jamf Cloud Connector.

item.title: Configure security baseline policies in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Deploy security baselines that establish a default and recommended security postures on Windows devices you manage with Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Set up Android (AOSP) device management in Intune for corporate-owned userless devices - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Set up Intune for corporate-owned userless devices built on the Android Open Source Project (AOSP) platform.

item.title: Get Started with the Device Offboarding Agent - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn about the Device Offboarding Agent in Microsoft Intune, its prerequisites, how it works, and how to configure it.

item.title: Using Windows virtual machines with Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: This article describes the general guidelines for using Windows 10/11 virtual machines with Microsoft Intune

item.title: Add, Configure, and Protect Apps with Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Add, configure, and protect apps with Intune.

item.title: Set up Android (AOSP) device management in Intune for corporate-owned user-associated devices - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Set up Intune for corporate-owned user-associated devices built on the Android Open Source Project (AOSP) platform.

item.title: Get started with macOS endpoints - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Microsoft Intune guide to set up and configure macOS devices from setup to creating policies and enrolling devices. You secure your corporate and organization-owned endpoints that are enrolled in Intune, and then deploy at scale with Apple Business Manager or Apple School Manager.

item.title: Add users to Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to add and managing Microsoft Entra user accounts from within Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Assign a role to an Intune administrator - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to assign a built-in or custom role to a user in Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Protect data and devices with Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn about the Intune capabilities that can help you protect your devices and data against unauthorized access and other threats.

item.title: Vulnerability Remediation Agent Overview and Set Up - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn about the Vulnerability Remediation Agent in Microsoft Intune, its prerequisites, how it works, and how to set it up. The agent uses AI to identify and prioritize vulnerability remediation based on Microsoft Defender Vulnerability Management data.

item.title: Remotely administer devices in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: View the required roles to use TeamViewer, how to install the TeamViewer connector, and step-by-step guidance to remotely administer devices using Microsoft Intune in the Azure portal

item.title: Deployment guide for Linux device management - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Use our platform deployment guide to set up Linux device management in Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Deployment guide for Windows device management - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Use our platform deployment guide to set up Windows device management in Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Troubleshoot and monitor Remote Help for Microsoft Intune. - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Use the troubleshooting and monitoring information for Remote Help with Microsoft Intune to ensure healthy and successful deployment.

item.title: Configure the Jamf Pro Cloud Connector to integrate Jamf Pro with Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Use the Jamf Cloud Connector to integrate Jamf Pro with Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Understand App Protection Policy Delivery and Timing - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn the different deployment windows for app protection policies to understand when changes should appear on your end user devices.

item.title: Help Desk Troubleshooting Dashboard - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Help desk staff use the troubleshooting pane to solve users' technical problems.

item.title: Microsoft Intune servicing information and details - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn more about the frequency of the Microsoft Intune service updates, the release cadence, and how to check your tenant release version.

item.title: Learn about Policy Configuration Agent and set it up - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn about the Policy Configuration Agent in Microsoft Intune, its prerequisites, how it works, and how to set it up. The agent is a generative AI feature that helps create Intune policies based on uploaded documents or benchmarks. The Policy Configuration Agent is a feature of Security Copilot in Intune.

item.title: Work From Anywhere Report in Endpoint Analytics - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Discover how the Work from Anywhere report in Microsoft Intune endpoint analytics provides insights into remote productivity, device readiness, and user experience.

item.title: Tutorial-Get started with cloud-native Windows endpoints - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Set up secure cloud-native Windows endpoints that are Microsoft Entra joined, enrolled in Intune, and then deploy at scale with Windows Autopilot.

item.title: Change Review Agent Overview - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn about the Change Review Agent in Microsoft Intune, its prerequisites, and how it works.

item.title: Get started with frontline worker (FLW) device management - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to manage frontline worker devices using Android, iOS/iPadOS, and Windows devices in Microsoft Intune. Get guidance on device use and Intune features built for FLW, like Remote Help. Also, learn about Microsoft Entra shared device mode (SDM) for FLW.

item.title: Validate Your App Protection Policy Setup - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to test that your app protection policy is set up and working correctly in Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Guided Scenario - Cloud-Managed Modern Desktop - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn about the guided scenario to set up and configure a basic Modern Desktop from the Microsoft 365 Device Management portal.

item.title: Move from Basic Mobility and Security to Intune-Migration Guide - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Follow this migration guide to move your mobile device management from Microsoft 365 Basic Mobility and Security to Intune. Includes policy mapping and license assignment steps.

item.title: Get Support for Endpoint Analytics - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Get support for Microsoft Intune endpoint analytics, including technical troubleshooting, online help, and product feedback options.

item.title: Licenses available for Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Intune is available with these licenses

item.title: Get support in the Microsoft Intune admin center - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Get online and telephone support for Microsoft Intune and other device management cloud services from within the Microsoft Intune admin center.

item.title: What's new in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Find out what's new in Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Privacy and personal data in Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn what personal data is collected and processed in Intune.

item.title: Device enrollment guide for Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Enroll Android, Android Enterprise, iOS, iPadOS, Linux, macOS, and Windows devices in Intune. Decide which enrollment method to use, and get an overview of the administrator and end user tasks to enroll devices.

item.title: Enable Windows diagnostic data and license verification - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to enable Intune tenant settings to use Windows diagnostic data and verify Windows licenses required for dependent features.

item.title: Endpoint management services and solutions at Microsoft - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Microsoft Intune is a family of on-premises products and cloud services. It includes Intune, Configuration Manager, co-management, Endpoint Analytics, Windows Autopilot, and the admin center to manage cloud devices and on on-premises.

item.title: Assign Microsoft Intune licenses - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Assign licenses to users so they can enroll in Intune

item.title: Unlicensed admins in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: This article describes how to give unlicensed admins permissions to access Intune.

item.title: About the Microsoft Intune tenant status page - Microsoft Intune
item.description: The Intune tenant status page displays details about your tenant and the status of connectors you've configured, and messages intended for tenants and about the Intune service health.

item.title: Data storage and processing in Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how personal data is stored and processed in Intune.

item.title: Data collection in Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn about personal data collected in Intune.

item.title: Compliance in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn about compliance, dependencies, and features in Microsoft Intune supporting data protection and regulatory requirements.

item.title: Data security and sharing in Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how personal data is secured and shared in Intune.

item.title: Audit, export or delete personal data collected by Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to audit, export, or delete personal data that is collected by Intune.

item.title: How to use Microsoft Intune documentation - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to search, provide feedback about, and contribute to Microsoft Intune product family documentation. This documentation also covers Configuration Manager, Intune, Endpoint analytics, and Windows Autopilot.

item.title: Configure Platform SSO for macOS devices - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Use Microsoft Intune to configure Platform SSO and deploy the configuration to your macOS devices. Platform SSO enables single sign-on (SSO) using Microsoft Entra ID with the Secure Enclave, smart card, or password authentication methods. You create a settings catalog policy to configure the settings. This article is a step-by-step guide to configure Platform SSO for macOS devices using Intune.

item.title: Settings insight - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Settings insight provides peer benchmarking information during security baseline configuration, showing when organizations similar to yours use Microsoft's recommended default values.

item.title: Using Remote Help on Windows to Assist Authenticated Users - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Use the Remote Help app to provide remote assistance to authenticated users who also run the Remote Help app, and to troubleshoot for frontline workers (FLW).

item.title: Automatically Hide Devices With Cleanup Rules - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Intune's device cleanup rules offer a simple, automated way to ensure that only actively managed devices remain visible in the admin center. Learn more about device cleanup rules and how to configure them.

item.title: What is Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Microsoft Intune manages users and devices, simplifies app management and automated policy deployment, and integrates with mobile threat defense. It connects to Managed Google Play, Apple tokens and certificates, and Teamviewer for remote assistance. Can use MDM or MAM to protect data, configure devices, and simplify access to company resources.

item.title: Optional diagnostic data that is collected by Intune client apps - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn about the optional diagnostic data that Intune Client apps collect.

item.title: View and correct personal data collected by Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to view and correct personal data that's been collected by Intune.

item.title: Microsoft Cloud PKI for Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: An overview of the Microsoft Cloud PKI service, available with Microsoft Intune Suite or as an Intune add-on.

item.title: Role-based access control (RBAC) with Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how RBAC lets you control who can perform actions and make changes in Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Wrap iOS Apps With the Intune App Wrapping Tool - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to wrap your iOS apps without changing the code of the app itself. Prepare the apps so you can apply mobile app management policies.

item.title: Learn about using Intune to manage Microsoft Defender settings on devices that aren't enrolled with Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to use Intune policy to manage Microsoft Defender security settings on devices that aren't enrolled with Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Network endpoints for Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Review endpoints for Intune. This page lists IP addresses and port settings needed for proxy settings in your Intune deployments.

item.title: Set up local admin account creation and password management for macOS devices - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Set up macOS account configuration with LAPS through automatic device enrollment for macOS devices in Intune.

item.title: Upgrade the Microsoft Tunnel Gateway server software - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Understand how Microsoft Tunnel Gateway upgrades to new versions of the tunnel software for Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Set permissions to Managed Home Screen using Android Enterprise OEMConfig - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Add the Samsung Knox Service Plugin, Zebra OEMConfig Powered by MX, Legacy Zebra OEMConfig, and Honeywell UEMConnect apps to Intune, and use the app schemas to configure permissions for the Managed Home Screen (MHS) app on Android Enterprise devices.

item.title: Centrally manage Admin Tasks - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Centrally manage admin tasks in Microsoft Intune. Use the unified Admin tasks view to organize and act on administrative tasks from Device Offboarding, Endpoint Privilege Management, and more.

item.title: Third-party device compliance partners support in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Use a third-party device compliance partner as a source of compliance data for devices you manage with Intune.

item.title: Remote Device Action: Find lost devices - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Locate lost or stolen devices by using the locate device feature in Microsoft Intune. Get details on security and privacy information when using the locate device action.

item.title: Use the Device Offboarding Agent - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to use the Device Offboarding Agent in Microsoft Intune to identify and offboard devices that are no longer in use.

item.title: Understand Microsoft Intune Management Extension - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Understand Microsoft Intune management extension for Windows.

item.title: Android App Protection Policy Settings - Microsoft Intune
item.description: This article describes the app protection policy settings for Android devices.

item.title: Microsoft Intune Reports - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Intune provides specific report types with focused views that contain consistent and timely data.

item.title: Platforms and policy types supported by assignment filters - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn which apps, compliance policies, and device configuration profiles and their platforms support assignment filters in Microsoft Intune.
